name: SLD decrease >=30% with RSORRES=PD
pattern: Tumor SLD down >=30% but RSORRES = "PD" same visit
example: SLD=45mm baseline -> 30mm at V3 (-33%); RSORRES='PD'

name: New lesion without RS escalation
pattern: New lesion (TU.TULNKID added) without RS escalation at the corresponding visit
example: TULNKID='TL009' first appears at V4; RSORRES='SD'

name: EX start after attributed AE
pattern: EX (exposure) start *after* AE attributed to it (CMACTRL/AERELID timing violation)
example: AESTDTC='2024-03-01' AEREL='Y'; EXSTDTC='2024-03-15'

name: Visit-window violation propagated
pattern: Visit window violation propagated across TR/RS/EX
example: V3 due Day 42 actual Day 56; TR/RS Day 56, EX Day 42

name: Conflicting demographics DM vs SUPPDM
pattern: USUBJID with conflicting sex/age across DM and SUPPDM
example: DM.SEX='M'; SUPPDM QNAM='SEX' QVAL='F' same USUBJID

name: Non-target PD with RS=SD
pattern: Non-target lesion PD without target lesion change but RS = SD
example: Non-target 'UNEQUIVOCAL PROGRESSION'; RSORRES='SD'

name: Confirmed PR without confirmation visit
pattern: Confirmed PR without required confirmation visit
example: RSORRES='PR' at V3; no visit within 28d confirming PR/CR

name: ARMCD not in TA valueset
pattern: ACTARMCD or ARMCD in DM not present in TA.ARMCD codelist
example: DM.ARMCD='TRTARMX'; TA has no 'TRTARMX' entry

name: Assigned subject missing disposition
pattern: Subject with populated ACTARMCD has no disposition record in DS
example: DM.ACTARMCD='TRT A'; DS has no records for USUBJID

name: RFXSTDTC mismatch with earliest EXSTDTC
pattern: DM.RFXSTDTC does not equal earliest EX.EXSTDTC for the subject
example: DM.RFXSTDTC='2024-01-15'; min(EX.EXSTDTC)='2024-01-10'

name: RFXENDTC mismatch with latest EXENDTC
pattern: DM.RFXENDTC does not equal latest EX.EXENDTC for the subject
example: DM.RFXENDTC='2024-06-30'; max(EX.EXENDTC)='2024-07-15'

name: Death flag without death details
pattern: DM.DTHFL='Y' but no corresponding record exists in DD dataset for the subject
example: DM.DTHFL='Y'; DD has no records for USUBJID

name: RACE=MULTIPLE without SUPPDM records
pattern: DM.RACE='MULTIPLE' but SUPPDM has no or insufficient multiple-race records
example: DM.RACE='MULTIPLE'; SUPPDM RACE has only 1 record (need >=2)

name: Assigned arm but no exposure record
pattern: Subject assigned to treatment arm (ACTARMCD populated) but has no EX record
example: DM.ACTARMCD='TRT A'; EX has no records for USUBJID

name: RFSTDTC mismatch with first EXSTDTC
pattern: DM.RFSTDTC does not equal the first EX.EXSTDTC for the subject
example: DM.RFSTDTC='2024-02-01'; min(EX.EXSTDTC)='2024-01-28'

name: Duplicate USUBJID across studies
pattern: USUBJID appears more than once in DM across all studies
example: USUBJID='S040' has 2 DM records with different STUDYID

name: ARMCD-ARM not one-to-one
pattern: ARMCD and ARM in DM do not have a one-to-one relationship
example: ARMCD='A' maps to ARM='Treatment A' and 'Treatment B'

name: Non-target overall response misclassification
pattern: Non-target overall response in RS contradicts individual non-target lesion assessments in TR
example: TR shows 'UNEQUIVOCAL PROGRESSION'; RS non-target='STABLE'

name: Table 7 overall response contradiction
pattern: Overall response contradicts the combined target + non-target + new-lesion status per RECIST Table 7
example: Target=PR, Non-target=SD, No new lesion; RSORRES='CR'

name: iRECIST immune PD confirmation failure
pattern: Immune-related PD flagged but no confirmation scan >=4 weeks later per iRECIST
example: iRECIST PD at V5; no follow-up scan within 4+ weeks
